title: Yuki's First Day Friends
synopsis: Yuki feels scared on her first day at animal school, but discovers friendship and courage when she helps a shy bunny find his missing toy.

pages.text: Yuki felt scared walking into her new school. The big yellow building looked so different from home. She held Mama's hand tight and took a deep breath.

illustration.description: A young Asian girl with black pigtails wearing a bright red backpack stands nervously outside a cheerful yellow school building. Her mother, wearing a blue dress, holds her hand reassuringly. The school has colorful windows and a welcoming front door with rainbow decorations.
illustration.alt: Yuki holding her mother's hand outside the bright yellow school building

pages.text: Inside the classroom, Yuki saw many animal friends playing together. There was Oliver the elephant painting at an easel, Luna the fox building blocks, and Sam the bear reading a book. They all looked happy.

illustration.description: A bright classroom with diverse animal characters engaged in activities. Oliver the gray elephant holds a paintbrush at a colorful easel, Luna the orange fox stacks wooden blocks, and Sam the brown bear sits reading. The room has rainbow rugs and cheerful decorations on construction paper-textured walls.
illustration.alt: Animal friends playing happily in the colorful classroom

pages.text: Yuki sat quietly in the corner feeling sad. She missed home and didn't know anyone yet. Then she noticed Benny the bunny sitting alone too. He looked upset and was searching for something.

illustration.description: Yuki sits cross-legged in a cozy reading corner with soft cushions, looking sad with downcast eyes. Nearby, Benny the white bunny with floppy ears looks worried as he searches under toys and books. The corner has warm yellow lighting and a textured carpet background.
illustration.alt: Yuki and Benny both sitting alone, looking sad in the classroom corner

pages.text: "What's wrong?" Yuki asked gently. Benny's eyes filled with tears. "I lost my favorite toy car. It's blue and makes me feel brave when I'm scared," he whispered.

illustration.description: Yuki kneels beside Benny the bunny, speaking kindly with a concerned expression. Benny has tears in his big brown eyes and looks very sad. His white fur is soft and fluffy, and both characters are surrounded by scattered toys on a bright blue play mat.
illustration.alt: Yuki talking gently to crying Benny the bunny about his lost toy

pages.text: Yuki felt brave and wanted to help. "Let's look together!" she said with a big smile. They searched under tables, in toy boxes, and behind books. Finally, Yuki found the little blue car under the art supplies.

illustration.description: Yuki and Benny search the classroom together, looking determined and hopeful. Yuki reaches under a table while Benny checks a colorful toy box. The scene shows their teamwork with bright primary colors and cheerful lighting, emphasizing their friendship and cooperation.
illustration.alt: Yuki and Benny working together to search for the lost toy car

pages.text: "Thank you, Yuki! You're so kind," Benny said, hugging his car happily. "Want to be friends?" From that day on, Yuki felt happy at school. She learned that helping others made her feel brave and loved.

illustration.description: Yuki and Benny smile joyfully together, with Benny holding his small blue toy car close to his chest. Other animal classmates gather around them with welcoming expressions. The classroom is filled with warm golden light and rainbow decorations, showing a scene of friendship and belonging.
illustration.alt: Happy Yuki and Benny celebrating their new friendship with other animal classmates

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Yuki feel on her first day of school?
questions.explanation: Yuki felt scared walking into her new school because everything was different from home.

questions.question: What did Benny the bunny lose?
questions.explanation: Benny lost his favorite blue toy car that made him feel brave when he was scared.

questions.question: Where did Yuki find Benny's toy?
questions.explanation: Yuki found the little blue car under the art supplies after they searched together.

questions.question: How did helping Benny make Yuki feel?
questions.explanation: Helping Benny made Yuki feel brave and happy, and she learned that helping others made her feel loved.

pages.text: Yuki felt _____ walking into her new school. She held Mama's hand _____ and took a deep breath.
"I lost my favorite toy car. It's blue and makes me feel _____ when I'm scared," Benny _____.
